title: helianthus orgyaloides
intro: Helianthus orgyaloides, also known as the Desert Sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, burns, and skin conditions, due to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Helianthus orgyaloides can be made into teas, salves, or infusions to harness its medicinal benefits.
